heading_content_part: OPT-OUTTo opt out of interest-based advertising in the Application, follow these instructions:iPhone/iOS: To “Limit Ad Tracking” on the iOS, please see the instructions below:1.Go to “Settings” > “Privacy” > “Advertising.”2.Turn on “Limit Ad Tracking.”Android: To opt out of interest-based ads in the Android OS, please see the instructions below:1.Open Google settings on your device (may be an app called Google Settings or an entry in your phone’s Settings menu, depending on your device)2.Tap “Ads”
